title: Product Manager
description: Define product strategy, roadmap, and work cross-functionally to ship features users love

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridge business and technical teams by gathering requirements and improving processes

title: Financial Analyst
description: Analyze financial data, build models, and support investment or corporate finance decisions

title: Marketing Analyst
description: Measure campaign performance, analyze customer behavior, and optimize marketing spend

title: Management Consultant
description: Help organizations solve complex business problems through structured analysis and strategy

title: Operations Manager
description: Oversee day-to-day business operations, optimize processes, and manage teams to hit targets

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Optimize procurement, logistics, and inventory to reduce costs and improve delivery performance

title: HR Generalist / Talent Acquisition
description: Recruit, onboard, and develop talent while supporting organizational culture and compliance

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: Run and optimize digital campaigns across SEO, SEM, social media, and email channels

title: Investment Analyst
description: Research companies and markets to support portfolio decisions for banks or fund managers

title: Project Manager
description: Plan, execute, and close projects on time and budget while managing stakeholder expectations

title: Startup Founder / Entrepreneur
description: Build and scale a venture from idea to product, managing fundraising, team, and growth
